tasks.label: init-and-push-its-maps
args: cd /d C:\Users\asus\public\its-maps && git init -b main && git add . && git config user.name "hanifasepthi" && git config user.email "hanifasepthi@users.noreply.github.com" && git commit -m "Initial ITS Maps upload" && git remote add origin https://github.com/hanifasepthi/its.git && git push -u origin main
